title: Fact Check: Is Moving Object Over Columbia Sky A ‘UFO’? Viral Footage Fuels Intense Debate on Social Media
description: A video has gone viral on social media showcasing a strange metallic sphere in Colombia's sky. Users calls it drone and human- made invention. The post Fact Check: Is Moving Object Over Columbia Sky A ‘UFO’? Viral Footage Fuels Intense Debate on Social Media appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: UFO Files: Harvard Astrophysicist Avi Loeb Decodes Second Batch Of Pentagon Documents On UAPs [WATCH]
UFO Spotted? Metallic Object Hovering Over Colombia Sky Sparks Frenzy As Pentagon Releases Secret UFO Files
description: A mysterious metallic object spotted hovering in the skies over Colombia has sparked intense debate online, with many social media users speculating it could be a UFO. The viral clip surfaced as the Pentagon released a fresh batch of files related to unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAPs), including videos, audio recordings, and military encounter reports.

title: Declassified UAP files spotlight San Diego sightings
description: The Pentagon has released decades of declassified UAP sightings, including military footage and witness accounts, from around the world, with some of the more talked about ones from San Diego previously declassified by the Department of Defense.

title: Tea houses and UFO villages: The ultimate 5-day guide to Taipei
description: Taipei hums in layers. Temples waft incense beside neon arcades. Locals start their days with scallion pancakes or hot soy milk, and end them with a cocktail behind an unmarked door. It's a place where centuries-old rituals coexist with pop culture kitsch. Every alley seems to lead to a shrine, a cat, or an unforgettable steaming bowl of deliciousness. What...
